hero.heading: Your guitar deserves expert hands
hero.lead: From a simple setup to a full custom build — I give every instrument the care and attention it deserves.

about.heading: Built and repaired since 1993
paragraphs: Hi, I'm Dave — a full-time stringed instrument repairer and luthier based in North Shields. I've been repairing instruments since 1993, trained at the City of Leeds College of Music, and have worked with touring bands, recording studios, schools, and retailers including JG Windows and PMT.
Professional work at sensible prices, on everything from guitars to sitars.

finalCta.heading: Ready to get started?
finalCta.lead: Tell me about your guitar and what it needs. I'll respond within 24 hours.

hero.heading: What I do
hero.lead: All prices are starting points. I'll give you an exact quote once I've assessed your instrument.

hero.heading: Get a quote
hero.lead: Tell me about your guitar and what it needs — or call, email, or DM directly.

footerBlurb: Full-time luthier and guitar repair, based in North Shields. Professional work at sensible prices.
